code: export class InventoryMessageParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const itemCount=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<itemCount;i++){const item={id:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),userId:wrapper.readInt(),slot:wrapper.readInt(),quantity:wrapper.readInt(),durability:wrapper.readInt(),icon:wrapper.readString(),type:wrapper.readString(),rarity:wrapper.readString()};console.log("[✅] parse from InventoryMessageParser is loading!");this._items.push(item);}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
